programme.title: Tamron Hall
programme.sub-title: Would You Know What to Do?
programme.desc: Dr. Sandra Lee, also known as "Dr. Pimple Popper," reveals a life-altering moment that was caught on tape; a couple who made a spontaneous decision when they found themselves in a terrifying situation on a Texas freeway; a woman shares how two heroes helped save her grandson in an emergency; the dramatic sea rescue that was caught on camera when a man's daughter got stuck in a rip current.

programme.title: Tamron Hall
programme.sub-title: Would You Know What to Do?
programme.desc: Dr. Sandra Lee, also known as "Dr. Pimple Popper," reveals a life-altering moment that was caught on tape; a couple who made a spontaneous decision when they found themselves in a terrifying situation on a Texas freeway; a woman shares how two heroes helped save her grandson in an emergency; the dramatic sea rescue that was caught on camera when a man's daughter got stuck in a rip current.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Forever Home
programme.desc: A couple have adopted four children and now their home isn't functional for a family of six; Drew and Jonathan overhaul the home to provide room for the kids' new lives and a home that will grow with them for years to come.

programme.desc: In this smokin' hot finale, three chefs heat up the Fire Masters Arena with their signature dishes; there's a bacon and egg battle in the Crossfire Round and an epic showdown between two BBQ heavyweights as they take on a Texas tailgate theme.

programme.desc: With a new baby and three dogs, Dana and Phil need to be closer to family, but the house is unsafe; Dana wants a new layout and a place for her dog grooming business, so she insists on having a hand in the design.

programme.title: Tamron Hall
programme.desc: Jools Lebron, the social media star behind the "very demure" trend, shares why the viral video ruined her life and what led to her new sobriety journey; singer, dancer and actor Dana Vaughns shares his struggle with addiction and how he is redefining fame on his own terms.

programme.title: Tamron Hall
programme.desc: Jools Lebron, the social media star behind the "very demure" trend, shares why the viral video ruined her life and what led to her new sobriety journey; singer, dancer and actor Dana Vaughns shares his struggle with addiction and how he is redefining fame on his own terms.

programme.title: Making It Home With Kortney & Kenny
programme.desc: Emma and Scott had difficulty searching for a house to accommodate Emma's limited mobility, so Kortney and Kenny eagerly assist the family to create better accessibility in their current home.
